headline: Jim Cramer Discusses ServiceNow’s (NOW) Share Price Performance
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer Took A Side On Biggest AI Debate & Discussed These 13 Stocks. ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Enterprise workflow management software provider ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW)’s shares are down by 50.9% over the past year and by 32% year-to-date. Bank of America discussed the […]

headline: Bridgewater Associates Is Trading the Software Apocalypse as It Sells Workday, Salesforce, Other Key SaaS Stocks
summary: Bridgewater’s massive exit from top SaaS stocks is fueling fears that AI could upend the traditional software business model and reshape the next era of tech investing.

headline: ServiceNow Experian Alliance Targets Governance Heavy AI Workflows At Scale
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) and Experian have entered a global partnership to integrate Experian's data and decisioning capabilities into the ServiceNow AI Platform. The collaboration is aimed at helping enterprises automate governance heavy workflows, including employee onboarding, risk assessment, and identity verification, using autonomous AI agents. The partnership is positioned to help enterprises run production grade AI workflows, particularly in regulated sectors that rely on trusted...
